title: Welcome
text:
I’m a Computer Science student with interests in data science, geospatial analysis, and urban/transportation applications.
This website is for EPPS 6323 - Knowledge Mining, where I’ll be sharing: Course reflections, Projects, and Data viz work
Stay tuned!
